records.ety: [L. corollarium gift, corollary, fr. corolla. See Corolla.]

defs: That which is given beyond what is actually due, as a garland of flowers in addition to wages; surplus; something added or superfluous.
quotes: Now come, my Ariel; bring a corollary, Rather than want a spirit.

defs: Something which follows from the demonstration of a proposition; an additional inference or deduction from a demonstrated proposition; a consequence.
